supply_low.label: Supply fan low speed setpoint
notes: Analog Value default used by the supply fan modulation logic.
Marked controller-specific in many templates — use Reinitialize controller specific values when downloading.

supply_high.label: Supply fan high speed setpoint
notes: Upper supply modulation limit for occupied / high demand operation.

dmp_min.label: Minimum damper position (%)
notes: Minimum fresh-air or relief damper command while ventilation is enabled.

co2_limit.label: CO2 concentration limit
notes: Threshold used by demand-controlled ventilation logic.

co2_damper.label: CO2 damper modulation parameter
notes: Scaling or setpoint linked to CO2-based damper control.

damper_feedback.label: Damper feedback hardware input
notes: SignalLowLimit / SignalHighLimit define the raw input range (often 0–10 V).
Minimum / Maximum define the engineering range shown in BACnet (often 0–100 %).

vent_disable.label: Ventilation disable logic input
notes: This is usually a logic port inside a composite block, not a simple DefaultValue point.
Prefer editing wiring in EC-gfxProgram if you need to change behavior rather than a numeric default.

econo_delta.label: Economizer delta-T or enthalpy differential
notes: Used by economizer enable / disable logic.

discharge_min.label: Minimum discharge air temperature
notes: Lower limit used by discharge temperature control or freeze protection.

HardwareInput.Default.label: Hardware input default engineering value
notes: Initial/default value for the scaled hardware input when applicable.

HardwareInput.Minimum.label: Hardware input engineering minimum
notes: Low end of the BACnet-presented range after scaling.

HardwareInput.Maximum.label: Hardware input engineering maximum
notes: High end of the BACnet-presented range after scaling.
